narrative:
Hill 1-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 634 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
